name: Intergalactic Defenders
short_description: Intergalactic Defenders is a retro pixel art space shooter with rogue-like progression, handcrafted levels, deep ship customization, and intense arcade combat. Defend humanity against an alien invasion across the galaxy.
detailed_description:
Intergalactic Defenders is a retro-inspired space shooter combining fast-paced arcade action with rogue-like progression and handcrafted pixel art. If you love classic shoot 'em up (shmup) gameplay with modern upgrades and replayability, this is your next obsession.

The year is 2187. Humanity's colonies are under siege. The alien Caedons have launched a merciless invasion — and you're the United Planetary Alliance's last line of defense. Strap into your starfighter, fight through waves of enemies, and take the battle across the galaxy.

⚔️ Intense Space Combat Engage in adrenaline-fueled top-down shooter battles against swarms of alien enemies, elite squadrons, and devastating bosses.

🎨 Stunning Retro Pixel Art Experience beautifully crafted pixel art visuals that pay homage to the golden age of arcade shooters — reimagined for modern displays.

🌌 Handcrafted Levels with High Replayability Fight through uniquely designed stages, each with distinct challenges, enemy patterns, and story beats. No two runs feel the same.

🚀 Deep Ship Upgrades & Customization Unlock and equip a wide arsenal of weapons, shields, and gadgets. Build your ship to match your playstyle — go full offense, defensive tank, or balanced fighter.

📖 Compelling Sci-Fi Storyline Uncover a gripping narrative as you push deeper into Caedon territory. Every mission brings new revelations about the alien threat and humanity's survival.

🧠 Strategic Decision-Making Make tactical choices during missions that shape the course of the war. Your decisions matter.
